trial_subscription_notice: By activating the trial, you will subscribe to vip.cosmopredict.com for a 3-day trial period at the promotional price shown in the offer. An amount of 20 MAD will be deducted from your card for verification purposes. After the 3-day trial period, unless you cancel your subscription, your account will automatically be upgraded to a full access membership, and 679 MAD will be deducted every 14 days. All details and conditions related to the subscription can be found in our Terms and Conditions.

footer_trial_text: By activating the trial, you will subscribe to vip.cosmopredict.com for a 3-day trial period at the promotional price shown in the offer. An amount of 20 MAD will be charged to your card for verification purposes. After the 3-day trial period, unless you cancel your subscription, your account will automatically be upgraded to a full access membership, and you will be charged 679 MAD every 14 days. All details and conditions related to the subscription can be found in our Terms and Conditions.
name_min_length: Complete name must be at least 3 characters
fieldEmail: Please enter a valid email address

zip_max_length: ZIP code must not exceed 10 characters

city_min_length: City name must be at least 2 characters
